name: insurance claims adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month, missed deadlines cause delayed claim resolutions. We provide exception monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking policy limits and deadlines for claims.
